message:
fix: OAuth set/remove config messages routed to wrong handler

Messages 0x8E/0x8F fell in the 0x80-0x8F range dispatched to
handleBinaryControlMessageFromClient, but the switch cases were in
handleAuthMessage (0x90-0x9F range). This caused admin OAuth config
changes from the UI to silently fail. Reassign to 0x9E/0x9F so they
route correctly.
